entries.title: Commentary on Lamentations on lamentations 3:14
entries.excerpt: Third, the delusion of those persons punished is exposed: "I have become the laughing stock of all peoples, the burden of their songs all day long." As elsewhere said: "I have become a laughing stock all the day; every one mocks me." (Jeremiah 20:7). That is, just as people are accustomed to be derided by others.
